acceptance.assertion: The experiment compares at least no-rLens, reading-pack, context-pack, and trace-gated conditions.
Metrics include unsupported claims, hallucinated paths, missing evidence, and rework count.

goal: Run a Vibe-Lab comparison of no-rLens, reading-pack, context-pack, full-dump, and trace-gated conditions before promoting a default access level.
title: Measure rLens agent-context conditions in Vibe-Lab
